seo.title: PulseRoots: Electronic Music Styles Tree
seo.description: Explore the evolution of electronic music with PulseRoots. An interactive tree visualization mapping genres from Techno and House to Ambient and Experimental. Discover styles, substyles, and example tracks.
seo.keywords: electronic music, music genres, techno, house, ambient, trance, music visualization, music tree
seo.ogDescription: Explore the evolution of electronic music with PulseRoots. An interactive tree visualization mapping music genres.
seo.twitterDescription: Explore the evolution of electronic music with PulseRoots. An interactive tree visualization mapping music genres.
seo.jsonldDescription: Explore the evolution of electronic music with PulseRoots. An interactive tree visualization mapping genres from Techno and House to Ambient and Experimental. Discover styles, substyles and example tracks.

panel.reportError: Spotted an error? Report it here
panel.spotifyNote: Note: Log in to Spotify in your browser to listen to the full track. Otherwise, a 30-second preview will be played.

intro.welcomeText: Welcome to PulseRoots! This guide will help you navigate the vast world of electronic music using our interactive tools.
intro.desktopText: On desktop, you'll find an immersive tree map visualizing the connections between genres. On mobile, genres are organized in a clear and accessible accordion list.
intro.stylesText: Both views start with broad "Families" (like Techno or House) and branch into specific styles and substyles. Click or tap any genre to open a panel with a detailed description and an example track.
intro.timelineText: Click the Timeline button () to explore 107 key milestones in electronic music history, from 1897 to the present. Hover over any dot to read the story; dots with a dashed ring include an external link.
intro.artistsText: For each genre, we've included a "Key Artists" section featuring notable pioneers and musicians who have significantly shaped its sound.
intro.accessibilityText: PulseRoots is keyboard accessible. Use the Tab key to navigate the genre tree nodes and press Enter or Space to open the details panel.
intro.noteText: This visualization represents one interpretation of how electronic music genres are categorized. Music is fluid, and other classifications may group styles differently.
intro.inspirationsText: PulseRoots is inspired by the incredible work of other music exploration projects. Special thanks to Ishkur's Guide to Electronic Music, Musicmap, and Every Noise at Once for paving the way.
intro.spotifyText: To listen to the example tracks, you may need a Spotify account. The embedded player provides a 30-second preview for all users. Logging into Spotify may unlock the full track.
intro.contactText: Thank you for visiting. I hope you enjoy exploring the world of electronic music.
intro.contactLinkText: If you have any suggestions, improvement proposals, if you have found any errors, or just want to say Hi!, feel free to write to me through our contact page.

footer.mission: Explore the deep connections and evolution of electronic music through an interactive lens. A journey from the roots to the rhythms of the future.
footer.supportText: A free website built with passion for electronic music. Any token of support helps keep it alive.
footer.copyright: PulseRoots. Mapping the pulse of electronic music.

sharePopover.shareText: Explore the evolution of electronic music with PulseRoots!

cookieConsent.text: We use cookies to analyze site traffic via Google Analytics. You may accept or reject non-essential cookies. We don't store personal data on our servers.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.intro: Got ideas for the site, found a bug, or just want to say hi? Don't be shy, drop me a message! I'd love to hear from you.

thanks.title: Message Sent!
thanks.text: Thank you for reaching out. I'll review your message and get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: PulseRoots Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how PulseRoots ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and discloses information we obtain from visitors to our website.
